page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by the x86_64 architecture. The system features 64 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary hardware differentiator is the inclusion of four NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. This configuration does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-speed data transfers between the instance and external storage or network resources.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance offers high resource density by bundling multiple enterprise-grade GPUs with a substantial allocation of dedicated CPU cores. The primary tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, which requires architectural planning for network-attached storage dependencies. This server is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities, such as deep learning inference, graphics rendering, video transcoding, and high-performance computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for parallel computing workloads. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes four NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM, making it highly suitable for intensive graphical and machine learning tasks. A key architectural tradeoff is the absence of local storage, which requires reliance on network-attached storage solutions. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance is optimized for workloads such as deep learning inference, video processing, and high-performance computing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-4x.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 96 GB VRAM, and a 64 Gbps baseline network speed.

tagline: A high-density GPU instance featuring four accelerators and dedicated processors for demanding parallel computing and machine learning workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 96 GB of total VRAM
64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.9 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
Zero local storage requiring network-attached storage solutions
